pi_items.source: Code analysis: setup_task.sh creates domain with 'virtualmin create-domain --domain acmecorp.test', export_result.sh references http://acmecorp.test/, verifier.py indirectly verifies via HTTP checks
Code analysis: setup_task.sh creates promo.html file at lines 25-33, verifier.py checks DirectoryIndex directive for 'promo.html' as first entry (line 80)
Code analysis: setup_task.sh creates index.php file at lines 37-40, verifier.py checks that index.php remains in DirectoryIndex list (line 81)
Code analysis: setup_task.sh creates /assets directory at line 43 with logo.png at line 44, export_result.sh tests http://acmecorp.test/assets/ at line 23
Code analysis: setup_task.sh embeds string in promo.html at line 30, export_result.sh explicitly checks for this string at line 15 with grep

privileged_info_summary: The task configures Apache directory indexing for domain acmecorp.test. All metadata claims are verified: the domain is created by Virtualmin at task setup; promo.html is the target index file containing the string 'PROMO_2024_LAUNCH'; index.php is retained as a fallback in the DirectoryIndex directive; the assets directory is created for testing directory listing behavior. All data is synthetic, generated during task initialization.
